content: Uranus has 27 known moons. The five largest are Miranda, Ariel, Umbriel, Titania, and Oberon. The other smaller moons include Caliban, Sycorax, Portia, Puck, Portia, and several others, many of which are named after characters from works by Shakespeare and Alexander Pope.
raw_content: Uranus has 27 known moons. The five largest are Miranda, Ariel, Umbriel, Titania, and Oberon. The other smaller moons include Caliban, Sycorax, Portia, Puck, Portia, and several others, many of which are named after characters from works by Shakespeare and Alexander Pope.
